pending_tasks.title: Character evolution 2.0
pending_tasks.description: Extend the new baseline character search with silhouette readability, pose clarity, state distinction, diversity preservation, stagnation recovery, and richer anatomy/style mutation spaces.

pending_tasks.title: WFC tilemap pipeline integration
pending_tasks.description: WFC module (level/wfc.py) exists and imports correctly. Need to add produce_level() method to AssetPipeline and integrate outputs into asset packs.

pending_tasks.title: Export pipeline integration
pending_tasks.description: AssetExporter exists but is not yet a first-class end-to-end stage in produce_asset_pack().

pending_tasks.title: Shader pipeline integration
pending_tasks.description: ShaderCodeGenerator exists but still needs a first-class produce_shader() path in AssetPipeline.

pending_tasks.title: Per-frame SDF parameter animation
pending_tasks.description: Each frame should support different SDF parameters for true shape animation rather than only transform-based playback.

pending_tasks.title: Spring-based secondary animation
pending_tasks.description: Add critically damped spring dynamics for follow-through and overlapping action in characters and VFX.

pending_tasks.title: Reaction-diffusion textures
pending_tasks.description: Add Gray-Scott reaction-diffusion for organic textures such as coral, lichen, and biological growth patterns.

pending_tasks.title: Quality checkpoint mid-generation
pending_tasks.description: Wire ArtMathQualityController mid-generation checkpoint into longer searches.

pending_tasks.title: Production benchmark asset suite
pending_tasks.description: Create benchmark characters, tiles, VFX and acceptance thresholds so future evolution is judged against production-like targets rather than only generic quality metrics.

pending_tasks.title: Procedural outline variation
pending_tasks.description: Partially addressed by adaptive outline width. Full per-segment style variation remains open.

pending_tasks.title: Auto knowledge distillation
pending_tasks.notes: 12 rules distilled manually. Auto-distillation not yet implemented.

completed_tasks.title: Integrate particles + cage deform into pipeline
SDF primitive parameter order fix (all 16 shapes)
Large-scale evolution validation (4 shapes, 120 iters, avg 0.8371)
Full project audit (14-module functional audit + commercial gap analysis)
Palette adherence compatibility fix for character evolution

capability_gaps: RESOLVED-S018: Evaluator too lenient -> 12-metric evaluator with strict thresholds
RESOLVED-S018: CPPN textures too simple -> enriched topology with hidden layers
RESOLVED-S018: No bone-driven deformation -> cage deformation with MVC
RESOLVED-S018: Knowledge base empty -> 12 rules + 10 models registered
RESOLVED-S018: No reference image comparison -> pipeline passes reference/palette
RESOLVED-S019: SDF primitive parameter order bug -> all calls use kwargs
RESOLVED-S019: Palette not constrained -> Floyd-Steinberg dither in OKLAB space
RESOLVED-S019: Particles/cage not in pipeline -> produce_vfx() + produce_deform_animation()
RESOLVED-S019: No validation suite -> 19-test validation, 100% pass
RESOLVED-S020: No multi-layer compositing -> render_sdf_layered() + composite_layers()
RESOLVED-S020: VFX evaluator too harsh -> evaluate_vfx() with rebalanced weights, explosion 0.24→0.66
RESOLVED-S020: Evolution not validated at scale -> 4 shapes, 120 iters, avg 0.8371, all positive trends
RESOLVED-S021: Outline gaps at sharp corners -> adaptive outline width based on curvature
RESOLVED-S021: Texture layer empty in layered rendering -> render_textured_sdf_layered()
RESOLVED-S021: Evolution convergence too slow for complex shapes -> shape-complexity-aware params
RESOLVED-S022: Character renderer disconnected from pipeline -> produce_character_pack() + produce_asset_pack() character integration
RESOLVED-S022: No multi-state character packaging -> multi-state sheets/GIFs/atlas/manifest export
RESOLVED-S022: Repeated session duplication risk -> session fingerprint guard added
RESOLVED-S023: No character search path before export -> baseline character evolution search added to produce_character_pack()
REMAINING: Character evolution still lacks stronger character-specific objective metrics and diversity/stagnation handling
REMAINING: WFC tilemap not first-class in AssetPipeline
REMAINING: Shader/Export modules not first-class in AssetPipeline
REMAINING: No per-frame SDF parameter animation
REMAINING: No reaction-diffusion textures
REMAINING: No spring-based secondary animation
REMAINING: No production benchmark asset suite

new_features: CharacterSpec dataclass for practical character asset generation
AssetPipeline.produce_character_pack() with sheets, GIFs, frames, atlas, manifest, palette JSON
SessionGuard task fingerprinting and duplicate-work detection
NumPy-only binary dilation fallback in character renderer

quality_improvements.character_output: Pipeline now emits usable multi-state character asset packs instead of isolated renderer-only outputs
quality_improvements.anti_duplication: Cross-session duplicate-work guard reduces repeated audits and redundant implementation
quality_improvements.runtime_robustness: Character rendering path survives even without SciPy in lean environments

audit_results.resolved_now: Pipeline-level character pack generation and multi-state export

new_features: CharacterSpec evolution parameters for pre-export search
AssetPipeline character evolution helper methods for anatomy/style/palette candidate mutation
Character evolution JSON artifact embedded in pack outputs

quality_improvements.character_output: Character packs are now selected through a baseline search loop rather than only preset rendering
quality_improvements.evaluation_compatibility: Palette adherence logic now supports Palette objects during evolution scoring

audit_results.biggest_gap_before: Character packs were still preset-driven rather than evolved
audit_results.resolved_now: Baseline search-before-export loop exists for character assets
audit_results.current_biggest_gap: Character evolution still needs stronger objective metrics, diversity handling, and richer mutation spaces
audit_results.second_gap: WFC/Export/Shader still not first-class pipeline outputs

evolution_history.notes: First real evolution run. Pipeline E2E test successful.
Infrastructure session: evaluator rewrite, CPPN enrichment, particles, cage deform, knowledge base.
Integration + validation session: palette-constrained rendering, pipeline integration, critical parameter bug fix, 19/19 validation pass.
Multi-layer compositing, VFX evaluator tuning, large-scale evolution validation. 4 shapes evolved (coin 0.85, star 0.82, gem 0.81, circle 0.87). 24/24 validation pass.
Adaptive outline width, texture-aware layered rendering, shape-complexity-aware evolution. Full project audit: 14 modules, 10 fully functional. 20/20 validation pass (44/44 cumulative).
Character pack pipeline integration, multi-state character export, cross-session session guard, evaluator consistency fix, and full validation at 491/491 pass.
Baseline character evolution search added before pack export, evaluator palette compatibility hardened, and full validation raised to 492/492 pass.

sdf_rendering: Inigo Quilez - 2D SDF functions and operations
animation: Thomas & Johnston (1981) - The Illusion of Life (12 Principles)
Lasseter (1987) - Principles of Traditional Animation Applied to 3D
pixel_art: Pixel art dithering: Bayer, Floyd-Steinberg, ordered patterns
OKLAB color space for perceptually uniform color manipulation
session_018_new: Procedural pixel art generation: CPPN+NEAT, WFC, L-systems, reaction-diffusion
Sprite animation math: Verlet particles, Fourier descriptors, cage deformation
Commercial sprite sheet standards (Unity/Godot JSON metadata)
session_022_new: Procedural creature generation and animation for games
Commercial multi-state character sheet packaging patterns

custom_notes.key_insight: SESSION-023 moved character generation one step closer to true iterative art production by inserting a baseline search-before-export loop. The project is no longer blocked on character evolution existing at all; it is now blocked on making that evolution significantly smarter.
custom_notes.next_session_focus: Prefer P1-NEW-9B if the goal is better final character art quality; otherwise prioritize WFC or export integration to improve downstream usefulness.
custom_notes.anti_duplication: READ DEDUP_REGISTRY.json BEFORE starting any work. Also use SessionGuard fingerprints before broad research or another audit pass.
custom_notes.parameter_safety: ALL SDF primitive calls MUST use keyword arguments. Never use positional args for circle/box/star/ring/triangle.
custom_notes.class_name_reference: ShaderCodeGenerator (not ShaderGenerator), LSystem (not LSystemGenerator), AssetExporter (not ExportBridge), PaletteGenerator.generate(harmony=...) (not scheme=...).
